ast.name: error
ast.source: Template Folder Property has to be of type 'text'!
ast.target: 模板文件夹属性必须是 'text' 类型！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Name of the frontmatter property in templates that defines where notes should be moved.
ast.target: 在模板中定义笔记应移动到何处的前置属性名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove the template folder property when applying the template to a note.
ast.target: 将模板应用到笔记时移除模板文件夹属性。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Template Folder Property has to be of type 'text'!
ast.target: 模板文件夹属性必须是 'text' 类型！
